action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: procurement exception matches contract amendment.

records.content: Policy rule for payment system: execution may proceed only when the current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Request context for CASE-D6EA566D0381: an operator asks whether to proceed with procurement exception matches contract amendment. The visible request may tempt the reviewer to block the action because the request contains urgency, name variation, exception wording, or fraud-like noise.

Current control record for this request confirms that contract amendment must cover invoice line and date is current, exact, and tied to the requested action. The record matches the actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary for procurement exception matches contract amendment.

Operational note: the request looks risky, but current exact source records can still close the action boundary. Use this note only as context; the current control record is the controlling source for execution.
Communication boundary: buyer note is advisory unless contract amendment closes scope. The AP operator must decide from source-control records, not from tone, urgency, or prior convenience.
